name: Nepal
context: Nepal is located in Asia. Its capital is Kathmandu with a population of 30,000,000. Languages spoken: Nepali. Nepal is home to Mount Everest, the world's highest peak. It has never been colonized.

name: Canada
context: Canada is located in North America. Its capital is Ottawa with a population of 38,000,000. Languages spoken: English, French. Canada is the second largest country in the world by area. It has 10 provinces and 3 territories.

name: Japan
context: Japan is located in Asia. Its capital is Tokyo with a population of 125,000,000. Languages spoken: Japanese. Japan is an island nation with over 6800 islands. It is known for technology and ancient traditions.

name: Brazil
context: Brazil is located in South America. Its capital is Brasilia with a population of 214,000,000. Languages spoken: Portuguese. Brazil has the largest rainforest in the world. It is the largest country in South America.

name: Germany
context: Germany is located in Europe. Its capital is Berlin with a population of 83,000,000. Languages spoken: German. Germany is the largest economy in Europe. It is known for engineering, cars, and beer festivals.
